message:
Apply comprehensive Clippy lints across demo_showcase

run_e2e.rs:
- Make pure getter methods const (name, test_filter, test_file, test_count, all, smoke_scenarios)
- Use map_or_else instead of map().unwrap_or_else() for artifact_dir
- Use let chains for cleaner log_event conditional
- Import std::fmt::Write (FmtWrite) for write!/writeln! macros to avoid allocations
- Use variable interpolation in format strings (format!("{now}"), println!("    - {test}"))
- Add #[allow(clippy::unused_self)] for parse_test_output
- Add #[allow(clippy::match_same_arms)] for test_count

command_palette.rs, guided_tour.rs, async_runner.rs, mod.rs:
- Similar const fn, let chains, and format improvements

files.rs, settings.rs, wizard.rs:
- Clippy lint fixes for match arms and conditionals

main.rs:
- Import organization and format improvements

dashboard.rs, docs.rs, jobs.rs, logs.rs:
- Minor lint cleanups

theme.rs:
- Formatting and style improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
